files.notes: This is a single comprehensive lesson department article containing multiple sections: Theology and Testimony (First Week), Work and Business (Second Week), Literature (Third Week), and Social Service (Fourth Week). All sections are part of one unified lesson department article, not separate articles.

files.notes: This file contains multiple complete articles and poems from the October 1931 issue. The content appears to be from various pages throughout the magazine, with clear article boundaries marked by titles and author bylines. Some content appears to be incomplete or fragmented, particularly in the middle sections dealing with habit formation and other topics.
